common.subtitle: An AI execution tool crafted for INTP-style deep thinkers

hero.title: Turn thoughts into action
hero.subtitle: For INTPs: execution is not willpower, it's being asked the right questions.
hero.imageAlt: Hero artwork blending sumi-e ink with glassmorphism UI

features.sectionDesc: Three moves that quietly close the loop from thought to action.

socratic.title: Socratic dialogue
socratic.desc: Gentle AI inquiry to clarify your intent

plan.title: One-click plan
plan.desc: From milestones to today's first step

capture.title: Capture
capture.desc: Hit ⌘K, drop a messy thought. No naming, no tagging, no folders.

refine.title: Dialogue
refine.desc: AI asks through four phases — intent, detail, boundary, ready. One question at a time, no fluff.

plan.title: Plan
plan.desc: Turns the dialogue into a visible plan tree: goal, first action, milestones, tasks, risks, MoSCoW priorities.

focus.title: Execute
focus.desc: Pick today's few from the tree. Run a pomodoro. Tick them off.

review.title: Review
review.desc: One click on Sunday to see what you did, where you stalled, and what to focus next week.

byok.a: No. Built-in Demo Key gives every new user 20 free calls per day — enough to run a full idea through the flow. Configure your own API key (OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Kimi, Doubao, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint) for unlimited use on your own bill.

privacy.q: Are my keys and data safe?
privacy.a: Keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM before hitting the database. Master key lives in server env vars only. Ideas, messages and plans stay under your account. Code is MIT-licensed — self-host for full control.

selfhost.a: Yes. A single docker-compose file spins up the full stack (PostgreSQL + Redis + Next.js + Nginx). Your server, your domain, your keys, zero external dependencies.

free.a: The code is MIT-licensed and free forever. The hosted version is free for now; AI cost is covered by BYOK.

selfhost.title: Self-host in 5 minutes
selfhost.desc: One docker-compose. One .env.prod. Your ECS, your domain, your keys.

inbox.title: Idea Inbox
inbox.empty: Quiet here. Press ⌘K to capture your first thought.

voice.providerUnsupported: Your AI provider doesn't support speech — switch to an OpenAI-compatible key
voice.quotaExceeded: Today's free calls are used up

focus.empty: No tasks today. Check the Inbox.

graph.title: Idea Graph
graph.empty: No ideas yet. Drop a few with ⌘K, then come see how they connect.
graph.hint: Drag nodes · Scroll to zoom · Drag canvas to pan

memory.title: Long-term memory
memory.intro: Nous quietly notes stable facts about you — preferences, habits, goals, blindspots — and uses them to tune how it asks questions. Everything here is visible, editable and deletable.
memory.placeholder: One sentence about a stable fact about you (not a momentary thought)
memory.empty: No memories yet. Chat a few rounds with ⌘K — AI will extract them; or add one manually.
memory.noEmbeddingHint: No vector; ranked by importance & recency

themes.title: Theme Market
themes.intro: Nous' visual language is swappable. Pick one — it applies instantly site-wide and follows you across devices.
themes.footnote: All built-in themes share the same CSS-variable contract. Custom-theme upload is coming later.

sync.title: Sync
sync.intro: Take your ideas out of Nous — export as Obsidian notes or push to your own Notion database. Two-way realtime sync is on the roadmap.

obsidian.title: Obsidian · one-way Markdown
obsidian.desc: Export every non-archived idea as a zip; each idea is one .md with YAML frontmatter (tags, status, dialogue, plan). Drop the folder into your Vault.
obsidian.exportHint: Sub-folders by status · includes plan & dialogue
obsidian.importHint: Multi-select .md. frontmatter is parsed; entries with source: nous + existing id are deduped.

notion.title: Notion · one-way push
notion.desc: Connect an Internal Integration token + a target database. Selected ideas become pages; tags, status, goal, first-action map to properties.
notion.tokenHint: Create an internal integration at notion.so/my-integrations and copy the token. Don't forget to add the integration to the target database via Connections.
notion.databaseHint: The 32-char segment before ?v= in your Notion database URL.
notion.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Notion? Pages already pushed will remain.
notion.schemaHint: Only Name (title) is required; Notion silently ignores missing properties.

quota.exhausted: You've used all free calls for today
quota.configureKey: Configure your own API key for unlimited use
